title: Large Print Sudoku for Seniors

recommended_categories_2026._selection_criteria: Topic match (sudoku/logic/puzzle) + paperback format + Blue Ocean weakness. Audience signals (seniors, large print) belong in subtitle/keywords, NOT category.
